title: Dandadan’s Latest Release Is Finally Available For Fans
content: The anime adaptation of Yukinobu Tatsu’s beloved Shonen Jump+ manga, Dandadan , ended its Season 2 in December last year. The anime has long captured viewers’ hearts with its eccentric story, lovable characters, and breathtaking animation.
author: ComicBook

title: Jujutsu Kaisen’s Best Team Gets a New Look After Season 3 Finale
content: The exciting Season 3 of Jujutsu Kaisen finally reached its conclusion with a major cliffhanger as fans await the Culling Game to continue in the upcoming season. While the fourth season might take a while to be released, the franchise has an exciting surprise for fans in May.
author: ComicBook

title: Sword Art Online's Echoes of Aincrad Game Previews Story in Trailer
content: Bandai Namco Entertainment began streaming on Thursday a story trailer for Echoes of Aincrad , a new action RPG based on Reki Kawahara 's Sword Art Online franchise , The game will have a Standard Edition, Deluxe Edition, Ultimate Edition, and Aincrad Edition release.
author: ANN

title: Baki-Dou: The Invincible Samurai Creators Talk Season 2, Major Death, And Future Crossovers (Exclusive)
content: Baki The Grappler has been one of the hardest-hitting anime franchises for decades, with the story of Baki Hanma becoming a major hit thanks to its several seasons on Netflix. At this year’s Anime Japan, it was confirmed that the latest entry, Baki-Dou: The Invincible Samurai , would be receiving a second season.
author: ComicBook

title: Hunter x Hunter Nen x Impact Game Adds DLC Character Shizuku on April 16
content: Arc System Works streamed a new character video on Thursday for Bushiroad and Eighting's Hunter x Hunter Nen x Impact 2D 3v3 fighting game based on Yoshihiro Togashi 's Hunter X Hunter manga, and it announces that the DLC character Shizuku will launch on April 16.
author: ANN

title: Kemono Jihen Manga Gets Stage Play
content: A new official website opened on Thursday to announce that Shō Aimoto 's Kemono Jihen manga is getting a stage play adaptation. The website unveiled a logo with the subtitle "Tokyo Arc." Inugami is a Tokyo detective who specializes in the occult.
author: ANN

title: Snowball Earth Anime Gets Same-Day English Dub
content: The English dub stars: • Griffin Burns as Tetsuo Yabusame • Alejandro Saab as Yukio • Cory Yee as Kojika Yabusame • Courtney Lin as Mist • Ben Balmaceda as Lonely Iwaki • Craig Lee Thomas as Narrator The dub staff includes: • Executive Producer: Eric P.
author: ANN

title: Anime’s Most Underrated Isekai-Lite is Coming to Netflix (With a Catch)
content: With the streaming wars continuously featuring major entries in the anime world, it should be no surprise that the isekai genre is getting its time to shine on some of the biggest streaming services.
author: ComicBook

title: New Ghost in the Shell Anime Screens Global Premiere at Annecy in June
content: The 2026 Annecy International Animation Film Festival will be held in Annecy, France from June 21-27. The anime will debut in July on "Ka-Anival!!," Kansai TV and Fuji TV 's new anime programming block that airs on Tuesday nights at 11:00 p.m.
author: ANN

title: Invincible Creator Explains Major Television Change From The Comics
content: Invincible’s fourth season just ended with one of the most gruesome fights of the series so far, with Mark and Conquest ending their life-or-death battle in a gory fashion. Despite the two Viltrumites shattering the universe with their brawl, there is one major element from the latest episode of the popular series…
author: ComicBook
